summary: Kona Coffee Donut has 1,778 weekly impressions but only 25 clicks (1.4% CTR). The biggest opportunity is the Chinese-language about-kona-coffee page which gets 1,397 impressions and 0 clicks. Korean queries rank well (position 1-6) but also get 0 clicks. The site has a critical HTTP/HTTPS split issue and GA4 is returning zero data. Fixing CTR on high-impression pages and resolving technical issues could 10x traffic.

priorities.title: Fix HTTP to HTTPS canonical/redirect issue
priorities.description: http://www.konacoffeedonut.com/en and https://www.konacoffeedonut.com/en both appear in GSC as separate pages. The HTTP version gets 107 impressions (4 clicks) while HTTPS gets only 2. This splits ranking signals. Ensure all HTTP URLs 301-redirect to HTTPS and set canonical tags to HTTPS versions.
priorities.expected_result: Consolidate ~109 impressions into single URL, improve position and CTR

priorities.title: Optimize Chinese (zh) about-kona-coffee page for CTR
priorities.description: The /zh/about-kona-coffee page has 1,397 impressions but 0 clicks, ranking at position 13 for queries like '夏威夷科纳咖啡风味' (889 imp) and '夏威夷科纳咖啡 介绍' (435 imp). Improve title tag and meta description in Chinese to be more compelling and click-worthy. Add structured data.
priorities.expected_result: Even 2% CTR = ~28 clicks/week (more than current total site traffic)

priorities.title: Fix GA4 tracking — all metrics showing zero
priorities.description: GA4 reports 0 users, 0 sessions, 0 pageviews. Either the tracking code is missing, misconfigured, or blocked. Without GA4 data, we cannot measure on-site behavior or conversions.
priorities.expected_result: Restore visibility into user behavior, bounce rate, conversion paths

priorities.title: Improve Korean content pages for click-through
priorities.description: Korean queries ('하와이 코나 커피', '코나커피', '말라사다 도넛') show 58+ impressions on /ko/about-kona-coffee at position 4 with 0 clicks. Korean visitors from Korea (61 impressions) aren't clicking. Optimize Korean meta titles/descriptions with compelling CTAs.
priorities.expected_result: Capture clicks from Korean tourist audience researching Hawaii trips

priorities.title: Improve local 'near me' rankings
priorities.description: 'donuts near me' has 23 impressions at position 9 with 0 clicks. 'coffee near me' has 6 impressions at position 29.5. These high-intent local queries need Google Business Profile optimization, more local citations, and on-page local signals.
priorities.expected_result: Moving 'donuts near me' from pos 9 to top 3 could yield 5-10 clicks/week

quick_wins.query_target: 夏威夷科纳咖啡风味, 夏威夷科纳咖啡 介绍

quick_wins.action: Add 301 redirect from HTTP to HTTPS for all pages
quick_wins.issue: http://www.konacoffeedonut.com/en splitting signals with https version

quick_wins.action: Verify and fix GA4 tracking code installation
Optimize meta description for 'kona coffee' query
quick_wins.note: Position 4.6 with 31 impressions and 0 clicks means the snippet isn't compelling

quick_wins.action: Add LocalBusiness structured data (JSON-LD) to homepage
quick_wins.benefit: Improve local search visibility and enable rich results

risks.description: Zero GA4 data means no visibility into actual site visitors, behavior, or conversions. We're flying blind on everything beyond search impressions/clicks.
Google is indexing both HTTP and HTTPS versions, splitting link equity and confusing crawlers.

risks.risk: Massive impression-to-click gap on Chinese pages
risks.description: 1,397 impressions on /zh/about-kona-coffee with 0 clicks. Google may eventually demote pages with consistently 0% CTR.
36% of clicks are branded ('kona coffee donut'). Non-branded queries generate impressions but almost no clicks, limiting growth.
Desktop: 1,454 impressions but only 0.3% CTR (5 clicks). Most desktop impressions come from Chinese queries — if those pages don't convert to clicks, overall performance suffers.

next_7_days.task: Fix GA4 tracking — verify tag installation on all pages, test with GA4 DebugView
Implement 301 redirects from all HTTP URLs to HTTPS equivalents
Rewrite Chinese meta title and description for /zh/about-kona-coffee targeting '夏威夷科纳咖啡风味' and '夏威夷科纳咖啡 介绍'
Optimize Korean meta tags for /ko/about-kona-coffee and /ko/menu/malasada pages
Add LocalBusiness JSON-LD structured data to homepage and location pages
Audit and optimize Google Business Profile — ensure hours, photos, categories, and attributes are complete
Review GSC data for early signals from changes; document baseline metrics for next week comparison
